scripts.android:phone: npm run sync:web && cap copy android && cap run android
scripts.android:phone:sync: npm run sync:web && cap sync android && cap run android
scripts.android:release:apk: npm run sync:web && cap copy android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
scripts.android:release:aab: npm run sync:web && cap copy android && cd android && ./gradlew bundleRelease
